programme.title: Perfect Wedding
programme.desc: Forced to work together, a wedding planner and an event planner learn that opposites can produce the most unexpected results.

programme.title: Dance-Off
programme.desc: Two cross-town rival dance teams go head to head for the National Nationals Championship.

programme.title: Triple Cross
programme.desc: During WW2, convicted bank robber Eddie Chapman becomes a triple agent working for both the British and the Germans.

programme.title: Earthsea: Part 1
programme.desc: If you love Harry Potter, you'll love acclaimed fantasy author Ursula K. Le Guin's epic tale of wizardry and prophecy. Ged, a reckless youth is destined to become the greatest sorcerer that the mystical land of Earthsea has ever known.

programme.title: Earthsea: Part 2
programme.desc: Ged continues his fight with the shadow, while Tenar is accused of killing the mother. Together with his friend, Ged comes to Antuan. The king is planing to let the evil out.

programme.title: Deadly Patient
programme.desc: Dr. Hillary Spenser is known as 'The Angel of the East Wing'. However, a patient mistakes her compassion for adoration, fuelling his obsession to do whatever it takes to fulfil his misguided vision of their future together.

programme.title: Murder in the Vineyard
programme.desc: Emma and her teenage daughter Beatrice have moved from the big city to a smaller town. Emma’s career is thriving, and Beatrice makes friends easily, even catching the eye of high school heart-throb Bryan. But things go downhill when Emma is hazed by an unknown assailant at a party. No one can understand why she is being increasingly bullied and harassed. Emma will do anything to protect her daughter from the mysterious bullies, but is a mother’s love enough to save her when things turn deadly?

programme.title: Swarmed
programme.desc: The residents of a small town find themselves battling a swarm of hornets which has been sprayed by a super pesticide.

programme.title: Sharknado 5: Global Swarming
programme.desc: With much of America lying in ruins, the rest of the world braces for a global sharknado, and Fin and his family must travel around the world to stop them.

programme.title: Land of the Blind
programme.desc: A political prisoner and a soldier unite to overthrow a brutal dictator and face the consequences of their uprising.

programme.title: Friends in Deadly Places
programme.desc: Maggie is a teen who's happy to make a new friend, until she realizes she's being groomed for something much worse. AKA My Best Friend's Secret

programme.title: Hooligan Legacy
programme.desc: Relentless. Gritty. Brutal. A visceral story of football, betrayal and revenge. Four men execute a daring football stadium robbery, but the volatile dynamic soon turns sour, landing the villainous leader of the pack in jail. Now he is back on the streets and will stop at nothing to take his revenge.

programme.title: Bridal Boot Camp
programme.desc: Andy Phillips is preparing for her upcoming wedding with her fiancé, Jordan. However, after chatting with her best friend, Andy starts to question if she has what it takes to make a strong and lasting marriage.

programme.title: Wedding Bells
programme.desc: Two people with commitment issues are asked to be best man and maid of honour at their friends' wedding. With nothing much in common, they didn't expect to find the romance of a life time.
